title: Nested zones, boundaries, and rendering quality
description: Complete nested zone/boundary rendering and dense-diagram quality work: zone hierarchy display, boundary nesting, overlay conflict priority, badge collapse/inspector handoff, edge/label legibility hardening, and acceptance examples.
triage_notes: IN PROGRESS. Cut from product principles rendering quality plus 03 zone view/nesting and overlay readability sections. 2026-06-27 Codex partial: fixed observed comprehensive-sample label overlap where zone labels (e.g. OnPrem/On-premises) collided with member nodes by reserving 36px top header padding for zone/boundary boxes and widening lane gap to keep adjacent boxes separated. Added layout regression test for zone label header clearance. Actual comprehensive sample OnPrem headerGap now 36px. 2026-06-27 Codex partial: added connection-density-aware component sizing in render layout. Node size now grows from graph edge degree plus permission overlay relationships so high-degree hubs get more internal padding and more port distribution room while low-degree nodes stay compact. Actual comprehensive sample CloudRun is now rendered as the largest hub size while GKECluster/Worker remain compact. 2026-06-27 Codex partial: changed permission overlay rendering from center-to-center straight lines to side-aware orthogonal paths with distributed source/target ports and stacked target-side labels. 2026-06-27 Codex correction: dense permission overlays now collapse long role labels and role badges into short in-node permission summaries; actual comprehensive sample permission overlay has 0 rendered roles/... texts and 9 permission summaries. 2026-06-27 Codex correction: normal graph edges incident to high-degree components now use balanced side-aware routing instead of concentrating on one or two faces; actual comprehensive sample CloudRun edges now use left 4 / right 3 / top 4 / bottom 4 endpoints. 2026-06-27 Codex correction: reciprocal/multi-edge pairs between the same two components now route on separate outside tracks instead of reusing the same line; Web->FirebaseAuth uses the upper track while FirebaseAuth->Web uses the lower track in the human-provided LR sample. 2026-06-27 Codex partial: viewer/playground settings now use the product taxonomy Views (overview/zone/layer), Render modes (2d/isometric/3d), and Overlays (auth/dataflow/boundary/permission/validation). Added layer as a registered semantic 2D view using layer-ranked layout; render-mode is accepted by render() and <archmap-viewer>. 2026-06-27 Codex correction: renderMode=isometric now routes to the optional Three.js renderer instead of static SVG, using an OrthographicCamera plus OrbitControls so the station-map/isometric look can be rotated, panned, and zoomed. 3D styling remains matched to the softer station-map palette: pastel layer colors, softer zone volumes, white background, pale floor plane/grid, and an isometric initial camera. 2026-06-27 Codex correction: clarified overlay checkbox semantics as additive information layers. Overview remains pure structure until overlays are checked; viewer controls now say Add info and call addOverlay/removeOverlay rather than blind toggle. Added regression coverage for overview structural baseline plus additive auth/dataflow layers. 2026-06-27 Codex correction: diagonal routing is now prohibited for normal graph routes. Side routes keep all segments horizontal/vertical, distribute ports along component faces, bias high-degree hubs toward longer/larger faces, and render a small black dot at every edge/overlay endpoint. Actual comprehensive sample via dist render: edgeCount 40, diagonalEdges 0, CloudRun 15/15 incident edges diagonalCloudRunEdges 0, label-vs-node hits 0, label-vs-label hits 0, endpointDots 59. 2026-06-27 Codex correction: start markers corrected from endpoint dots to startpoint dots, and normal graph edges plus overlay edges now share one parallel-lane allocator so overlapping horizontal/vertical segments are offset together. Actual comprehensive sample via dist render: renderedPaths 59, diagonalSvgSegments 0, parallelOverlaps 0, startDots 59, endpointDots 0. 2026-06-27 Codex correction: component spacing increased in layout, not samples. Rank gap is now 170, same-lane node gap 72, zone lane gap 128; added regression for same-lane component separation. Actual comprehensive sample via dist render: canvas 3620x3012, minNodeGap 72, diagonalSvgSegments 0, parallelOverlaps 0. Browser current sample after reload: minNodeGap 72, diagonalSegments 0, parallelOverlaps 0. 2026-06-27 Codex correction: corner rendering cleaned up. Crossing gaps are no longer inserted near segment corners, jog connectors prefer the natural vertical-then-horizontal return, and edge strokes use round line joins/caps. Actual comprehensive sample via dist render: renderedPaths 59, diagonalSvgSegments 0, parallelOverlaps 0, roundedJoins true. Browser current sample after reload: lineJoin round, lineCap round, diagonalSegments 0, parallelOverlaps 0. 2026-06-27 Codex correction: offset route corners now use route-level offset polylines. Adjacent shifted horizontal/vertical segments meet at the mathematical intersection of their shifted lanes, so the horizontal line between corners keeps one Y coordinate instead of stepping between old and shifted lanes. Added regression for offset L-routes without interior tick marks. Browser current sample after reload: diagonalSegments 0, parallelOverlaps 0. 2026-06-27 Codex correction: protected component-exit stubs. Parallel-lane offsetting now preserves the first and last 14px of a route along the original component face direction before escaping to shifted lanes, so an edge cannot leave its startpoint by turning back through its own component. Added regression for first component-exit preservation; browser sample remains orthogonal with diagonalSegments 0. Completion: nested modeled zones/boundaries render legibly; dense diagrams remain inspectable; no edge-over-node/shared-endpoint regressions in tests/examples. Remaining: nested zone hierarchy display, boundary nesting quality, selected highlight, diagnostics-to-diagram focus, broader non-permission edge-label collision handling, optional richer isometric/3D controls (angle presets/depth/layer visibility). 2026-06-27 Codex correction: route bend count minimized. Layout routing now chooses complementary source/target faces so ordinary graph edges render as straight lines or one-bend L routes (<=3 layout points), and SVG parallel-lane offsetting no longer adds extra stubs to simple <=3-point routes. Browser current sample after reload: pathCount 11, maxPoints 3, over3 0. Regression added for ordinary routed edges <=3 points. 2026-06-27 Codex correction: non-rectangular shape boundary ports. Start/end ports for circle/ellipse, diamond, and database nodes are now projected to the rendered shape boundary instead of the node bounding box, including overlay permission ports. Startpoint dots now inherit the normal/emphasis/overlay line color. Browser current sample after reload: dotFill equals pathStroke, pathCount 11, maxPoints 3, over3 0. Regression added for non-rectangular endpoint boundaries and startpoint color CSS. 2026-06-27 Codex correction: comprehensive sample promoted to regression fixture. Zone/boundary labels now reserve label boxes and shift within the box to avoid overlaps across overview/layer + boundary overlays. Startpoint dots no longer have a white stroke. Normal routes still prefer <=3 points, but when a route would intersect another node shape it switches to an outer safety lane and evaluates source/target faces plus face slots against actual shape interiors; this allows >3 points only as a no-shape-overlap exception. Comprehensive fixture tests now assert no zone/boundary label overlap and no graph edge samples inside non-endpoint node shapes. 2026-06-27 Codex correction: canvas now includes routed edge geometry. After routing and label placement, layout computes extents across nodes, zones, boundaries, edge points, and edge labels; if outer safety lanes produce negative or beyond-canvas coordinates, all geometry is shifted inside the viewBox and width/height are expanded. Comprehensive fixture now asserts every edge point and edge label point is within layout.width/layout.height. Browser current sample after reload: edgeBounds fit within viewBox.
